vla_highlights: CorridorVLA: generative action heads via sparse anchors (diffusion-class)
FingerViP + FingerEye: dexterous manipulation with fingertip vision-tactile sensing
Cortex 2.0: world models grounded in industrial deployment
Tesla Optimus Gen3: mid-year reveal, Fremont factory production Jul-Aug
智元景灵G2: 7x24h continuous operation in 3C manufacturing line
宇树: wheeled-bipedal humanoid with skating/360 rotation/front flip
ai_highlights: DeepSeek-V4: million-token context designed for agents
AWS Bedrock AgentCore + MCP: workforce AI agents
Codex 3.0 + Claude 4.7: agentic coding tools evolving
